sets.set_transcript: Uh, you know I started reading a lot of history books recently and I came across this book, it's called Bury My Heart at Wounded Knee. It's a total and complete history of Native Americans. And I was reading this book and I was thinking about modern politics and I think you can say whatever you want about Donald Trump as a president, if we look back at history he would have made an excellent Native American war chief. You want to know the group of people who could have used Donald Trump's immigration plan the most? The original Native Americans, that's who could've used it. You know he's like, 'The white people are coming here bringing tea, bringing crime. Some of whom could be good people, not these people they're horrible, very bad. There's angry Andrew Jackson, nobody likes this guy. He put me on a trail I cried the entire time, yes I did. And where do we end up? Oklahoma, what a shithole this place, nobody even likes it there, it's horrible. And then we made a deal with the whites, we gave them all of the land and they gave us beads. Why? If I was negotiating I would have gotten us way more beads. We're going to make Native America great again!'

sets.set_transcript: I remember the first time I caught my parents fucking. My mom had to sit me down and give me the talk. You're not like other girls, 'cause other girls would never try to street fight a pigeon. Or rummage through the trash by chewing through the bag, but she's a little bit different. I love that every inch of your skin's a different color. And I love how every one of your mess sores feels like rubber. And you have the prettiest, laziest eyes, and when you defecate, you pick it up just to throw it at other guys. The world is ours, I know that it is, we can write our initials on the sidewalk with piss. Or maybe we could start a family and give birth to a miscarriage!

I don't do long at the gym, I go for like twenty minutes. Turns out pissing off fat chicks is a real mood booster. They're just jokes, I think fat lives matter. I've got a lot of sympathy for fat people because I was anorexic. I know exactly what it's like to feel obese.
